metadata.description: Automated security scanning and comprehensive static security review for Claude Code. Combines 7 tools (Bandit, Semgrep, Trivy, TruffleHog, Gitleaks, CodeQL, mcps-audit) with a senior AppSec agent covering 12 vulnerability categories.

plugins.name: claude-code-security-plugins
plugins.description: Automated security scanning (Bandit, Semgrep, Trivy, TruffleHog, Gitleaks, CodeQL, mcps-audit) and comprehensive static security review agent for Claude Code
